content.claim: Until 2013, Hungarian primary schools were maintained by municipalities; Act CXC of 2011 centralized this duty to a state agency (Klebelsberg School Maintainer Centre) effective 1 January 2013, terminating schools as separate legal entities and merging them into KLIK.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Legal and governance lens
limitations: Source cited through research notes, not original statute text provided
Implementation scope (public vs. private schools) not fully detailed in notes
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
